response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile/embedded systems, but the role requires deep expertise in Java, Kotlin, JVM internals, and the Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate ecosystem. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms work years ago) and Kotlin, Spring, and IDE-internals experience are absent. The closest IDE-relevant experience is C/C++ work on NI LabWindows/CVI in 2014–2015, which is dated and not JVM-focused.
strengths: Proven track record on complex, large-scale systems at Stripe, Shopify, and Dunnhumby
Prior IDE/developer-tooling exposure via NI LabWindows/CVI and MCP code generators
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, open-source maintainership)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only minimal, dated Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate ecosystem experience listed
No evidence of JVM internals or modern language-tooling/IDE-internals work

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and tooling background
